title: Jerry Powell & the Delusions of Grandeur
original_title: Jerry Powell & the Delusions of Grandeur
overview: Jerry Powell is a gas-huffing thief with memory distrust syndrome. At the brink of insanity, Powell finds himself chased by a pulpy gang of criminals as he attempts to deliver a mysterious package for a money-launder.
